title: enable korczewski system-test runs
description:
## Summary

- **`resolveAssignee()` in `systemtest-runner.ts`**: replaced fragile username-prefix email matching with a `/api/auth/me` lookup after login — works regardless of whether the KC username matches the email local-part (`paddione` vs `patrick@korczewski.de`)
- **`assign.ts`**: auto-`upsertCustomer` when the assignee has no existing client record, so self-assignment works on korczewski without a prior manual CRM entry
- **`systemtest-fanout.sh`**: now exports `ENV`, `E2E_ADMIN_USER=paddione` (both prod realms use `KC_USER1_USERNAME=paddione`) — fixes `deriveEnv()` falling back to `'dev'` and outcome files landing in the wrong slot
- **Bonus — `manifests.bats` test 23**: added `website` to the known-safe value exclusion list to stop the false-positive on `PGDATABASE/PGUSER=website` appearing two lines before `PGPASSWORD`

## Test Plan

- [x] `task test:all` — all 24 manifest tests + 31 scripts tests pass (previously test 23 was failing)
- [ ] `E2E_ADMIN_PASS=… task systemtest:all ENV=korczewski` — walks all 12 system-test templates against web.korczewski.de and writes `tests/e2e/results/outcomes/systemtest-*-korczewski.json`
- [ ] `task systemtest:analyze ENV=korczewski` — produces korczewski drift report

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
